description: Moss green shorts made of Dri-Fit technology, soft elasticated waistband with concealed drawstring, two welt pockets on the sides with mesh lining and zippered closure, white panel work on the sides, Nike "swoosh" logo above left leg hem, Nike "T 90" logo on left leg, mesh panel on the inner leg side Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)
